title: Ability to create an Item in a Monday Board that then creates an Item in Atlassian Jira when using the NEW Monday.com Jira Integration Tool
excerpt:
Have the ability to create an Item in a Monday Board that then creates an Item in Atlassian Jira when using the NEW Monday.com Jira Integration Tool.

posts.author: CraigSiel (Craig Siel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have the ability to create an Item in a Monday Board that then creates an Item in Atlassian Jira when using the NEW Monday.com Jira Integration Tool.
This ability existed with the now Deprecated Monday.com Jira Integration Tool.
